---
title: "VDS2526"
author:
  - "Sofiya Antonyuk (2467715)"
  - "Benedict Pierret TAA NGUIMBIS ESSEME (2261512)"
  - "Viktor Szabó (2503521)"
  - "Ferenc Wimmer (2469928)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# bring in your plots
source("SA_2a_4.R")

```


# Q2a. 2018 Average NO2 Hotspot Map

```{r}
SA_q2a_hotspot
```

# Q2a. 2018 Average NO2 Bar Chart

```{r}
SA_q2a_barchart
```

# Q4. 2001-2018 Heat Map

```{r}
SA_q4_heatmap
```
